creator: chris@chrullrich.net
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.1R/relnotes/:

Security and Errata
This section lists the various Security Advisories and Errata Notices since 14.0-RELEASE.

Security Advisories
Advisory	Date	Topic
No advisories.

Errata Notices
Errata	Date	Topic
No notices.


This section is not present in all the release notes pages, and variously empty and filled in in others. I looked at all pages since 12.0:

- Absent: 13.1, 13.2, 13.3
- Empty: 12.0, 13.0, 14.0, 14.1
- (Probably) complete: 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.4, 13.4

There are plenty of sources for these advisories elsewhere on the website, but that very duplication opens the door to inconsistency. I think the entire content of this section should be replaced with a link to the respective errata page.

At the same time, that page should be linked from the fourth paragraph of the relnotes introduction boilerplate as well.
